---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new strategy, tool, or capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<!-- What are you trying to accomplish? What doesn't the current system do? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- High-level description of what you want built. Include any research
     references or alternative approaches considered. -->

## Scope

- [ ] New strategy / edge
- [ ] New CLI command
- [ ] New dataset / data source
- [ ] Infrastructure (backtester, dashboard, risk, OMS)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other:

## Risk / safety considerations

<!-- Does this touch live trading, order routing, or margin? How will it be gated? -->

## Success criteria

<!-- How will you know it works? Backtest metrics, test coverage, behavior
     observed on live/paper, etc. -->
